title: Produce a bounded Forecast signal
description: Deferred until private evidence establishes supported formula and minimum evidence rules for each accepted spending shape. Goal trace: G3.
rationale: A generic run-rate over recurring, irregular, refund-heavy, zero-budget, or partial-period spend would create false precision.
story_want: see a bounded end-of-period estimate only when evidence supports it
acceptance_criteria: Given a released Forecast policy and evidence satisfying its formula-specific minimum horizon and coverage, when Forecast is evaluated, then the estimate, exact inputs, formula version, evidence horizon, limitations, and comparison baseline are returned.
Given an unsupported evidence shape or unmet sufficiency rule, when Forecast is requested, then Insufficient Evidence or Unsupported Policy is returned and no estimate or confidence is emitted.
Given identical evidence and policy versions, when Forecast is repeated, then semantically identical output is returned without floating-point arithmetic.
